title: Top 8 Herbal Tinctures for Soothing a Bitter Taste in Mouth
description: Zingiber officinale, commonly known as ginger, is a natural remedy that can help with a bitter taste in the mouth. The tincture form of ginger makes it easy to take and can provide relief from bitter taste caused by digestive issues, such as acid reflux or stomach ulcers. Ginger contains compounds like gingerols and shogaols, which have anti-inflammatory properties and can help soothe the digestive system.
